ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the car's engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car's engine */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the car in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the car model was manufactured */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon fuel efficiency */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "engine_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the engine */,
  "emissions_standard" TEXT /* Emissions standard the car meets (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 3) */,
  "safety_rating" INTEGER /* Safety rating of the car (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "interior_material" TEXT /* Material used for the interior (e.g., leather, cloth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES car_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car type */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car type */,
  "cargo_space" REAL /* Cargo space in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model that was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Sale price for the car model */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sale */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespeople ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model to which the feature belongs */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sunroof, navigation system) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_group" TEXT /* Group of features (e.g., safety, comfort, technology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model being reviewed */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer leaving the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer's review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warranty" (
  "warranty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warranty record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model covered by the warranty */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the warranty in years */,
  "coverage_description" TEXT /* Description of what the warranty covers */,
  "warranty_start_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty starts */,
  "warranty_end_date" TEXT /* Date the warranty ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warranty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warranty_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for login */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., engineer, designer, marketer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespeople" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the salesperson was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
